cta.choose_file: Choose a file or drop it here

hero.title: Convert documents. Fast, clean, modern.
hero.subtitle: Convert PDF, DOCX, CSV, Excel, JSON, images and more on your local backend. No account, no extra steps.

fast.title: Fast workflow
fast.desc: Upload, convert, download. Everything on a single screen.

real.title: Real backend
real.desc: Formats come from the FastAPI endpoint, the frontend follows what the backend supports.

control.title: Controlled files
control.desc: Size limit, extension validation, output folder and cleanup are already wired in.

converter.drop_hint: Accepted formats: PDF, DOCX, TXT, XLSX, CSV, JSON, PNG, JPG, SVG

errors.extension: This format is not accepted. Pick a file from the list.

formats.title: All available conversions
formats.subtitle: This list comes directly from the backend, so it stays in sync with what is available.
formats.error_hint: Make sure the backend is running on http://localhost:8000.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Convert a document in a few simple steps.
how.lead: Le Format is built to get straight to the point: pick the conversion, add your file, then grab the result.

1.title: Pick a conversion
1.text: From the Formats page, select e.g. PDF to Word, CSV to Excel or PNG to PDF.

2.title: Add your document
2.text: The converter prepares the expected file type automatically. Just drop the file or pick it from your phone.

3.title: Download the result
3.text: Once the conversion is done, the download button appears right away with the converted file name.

notes.1: No account is required to use the platform.
notes.2: The displayed formats come directly from the FastAPI backend.
notes.3: Temporary files are cleaned up automatically on the server side.

footer.tagline: A document converter wired directly to your FastAPI backend.
footer.status_hint: Change VITE_API_BASE_URL if your backend is on another host.
